events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the work order only describes the *method* (color/location leak ID) without an actual observed color or drip point, I classified this as `needs_more_info`: the standard fluid-color legend (red=ATF, green/orange/pink=coolant, dark amber/black=oil, clear/light amber=power steering or brake) narrows the *system* but can't pin the *specific failed component* (gasket, seal, line) without a dye trace and reservoir-level check against OEM specs. Marked `degraded` with medium risk and listed the confirmatory steps needed before repair sign-off.
